description_long: This is a black athletic sneaker with a low-cut profile, featuring a synthetic and mesh upper for breathability and durability. The shoe has a standard lace-up closure with black laces threaded through reinforced eyelets. The midsole appears cushioned and thick, designed for comfort and shock absorption, while the outsole is robust and likely made of rubber for traction. Subtle branding details are visible on the tongue and side, with a small pull tab at the heel for easy wearing. The overall design is streamlined and functional, suitable for urban environments and everyday wear. The shoe shows signs of moderate use, with some creasing and wear visible on the upper and sole.
description: A black athletic sneaker with a cushioned sole, mesh and synthetic upper, and standard lacing, showing moderate wear and subtle branding.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the lace-up system, branding on the side, and the pull tab at the heel.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the heel, pull tab, and the width of the sole.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the lateral branding, lace structure, and the overall silhouette.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the toe box, lacing, and the branding on the tongue.
attribute_logo: White Nike Swoosh on the side, white text logo on the tongue
